organizationSetup.title: Organization Setup
organizationSetup.description: Please set up your organization details to start managing your workspace.
organizationSetup.name: Organization Name
organizationSetup.nameDescription: The official or registered name of your organization.
organizationSetup.taxOfficeDescription: The name of the tax office where your organization is registered.
organizationSetup.addressDescription: The legal physical address of the organization.
organizationSetup.supportedLanguagesDescription: Select the languages in which your menu will be displayed.
organizationSetup.defaultLanguageDescription: The default language displayed when the menu first loads.
organizationSetup.priceVariesByLanguageDescription: If enabled, you can set different prices and currencies for each language. If disabled, a single common currency is used for all languages.
organizationSetup.currencyDescription: Select the currency to be used for {{lang}}.
organizationSetup.singleCurrencyDescription: The default currency to be used for menu pricing.

validation.nameLength: Organization name must be at least 3 characters.
validation.taxNumberLength: Tax number must be exactly 10 digits.
validation.taxNumberDigits: Tax number must contain only digits.
validation.activeLangsRequired: At least one active language must be selected.
validation.defaultLangMustBeActive: Default language must be one of the active languages.

organizationDashboard.title: Vector Management Dashboard
organizationDashboard.welcomeDescription: Your system is ready for managing your organization.
organizationDashboard.impresiveCardDescription: This card has a dot grid background and a light effect moving from left to right.

organizationSwitcher.selectOrganizationDescription: Please select an organization to continue.
